name: forge
summary: Heat, soot, ringing metal. A working smithy: forge against the back wall, anvil in front, quench to the side.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: 3:2 wide — work stations span the width

primary_palette.note: classic smithy — forge, anvil, bellows cluster
caster's forge — bronze and iron pouring

story_prompts: active smithy mid-commission — weapon half-finished on the anvil
cold forge, tools intact but no fire — smith killed, left everything
war-forge running double shifts — soot thick, sparks everywhere
dwarven master forge, ornate bellows, quality beyond utility

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim ambient — the forge itself dominates (0.25)

anti_patterns: forge must be against a wall with chimney implied — never center-placed
anvil goes in front of the forge at working distance (1-2 cells)
don't cluster props under the chimney / exhaust zone — smoke implies clear air above
